metadata.scheme_name: Dr. Y.V. Singh Award for Best Thesis in Vegetable Science

raw_data.details: The “Dr. Y. V. Singh Award for Best Thesis in Vegetable Science” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to recognize and encourage students for their outstanding research work in the field of Vegetable Science.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a student of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The applicant must have submitted a thesis in the field of Vegetable Science at the university. The award is granted for a period of one year only.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme.

Singh Award for Best Thesis in Vegetable ScienceCash AwardResearchStudentThesisVegetable ScienceDetailsThe “Dr. Y. V. Singh Award for Best Thesis in Vegetable Science” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to recognize and encourage students for their outstanding research work in the field of Vegetable Science. BenefitsAward Amount: ₹20,000 per year. EligibilityThe applicant must be a student of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. The applicant must have submitted a thesis in the field of Vegetable Science at the university. The award is granted for a period of one year only. Application ProcessOfflineStudents are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments. Documents RequiredDocuments are required in accordance with the university guidelines prescribed for this scheme. Frequently Asked QuestionsWhat is the award amount under this scheme? The award carries a cash prize of ₹20,000 per year. For how long is the award given? The award is granted for a duration of one year only. Who is eligible to apply for the Award? Any student of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, who has submitted a thesis in Vegetable Science, is eligible to apply. Is the award open to students from other universities? No. How can students apply for this award? Students must submit their applications in the prescribed form as notified by the university. Who reviews and evaluates the applications? A selection committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, reviews and evaluates all applications following the prescribed procedure. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 186)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: What is the award amount under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The award carries a cash prize of ₹20,000 per year.

faqs.question: For how long is the award given?
faqs.answer: The award is granted for a duration of one year only.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for the Award?
faqs.answer: Any student of Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, who has submitted a thesis in Vegetable Science, is eligible to apply.

faqs.question: Is the award open to students from other universities?
How can students apply for this award?
faqs.answer: Students must submit their applications in the prescribed form as notified by the university.

faqs.question: Who reviews and evaluates the applications?
faqs.answer: A selection committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, reviews and evaluates all applications following the prescribed procedure.
